{
  "project_name": "Loan Management System",
  "business_summary": "A system to manage loan applications, approvals, disbursements, and repayments.",
  "actors": [
    "Customers",
    "Loan Officers",
    "Administrators"
  ],
  "functional_requirements": [
    "User registration and authentication",
    "Loan application submission",
    "Loan approval workflow",
    "Disbursement processing",
    "Repayment tracking"
  ],
  "non_functional_requirements": [
    "High availability",
    "Scalability",
    "Security"
  ],
  "technology_stack": {
    "backend": "Java, Spring Boot",
    "database": "MySQL",
    "frontend": "Angular",
    "containerization": "Docker"
  },
  "architecture_pattern": "Microservices",
  "modules": [
    "User Management",
    "Loan Application",
    "Approval Workflow",
    "Disbursement",
    "Repayment"
  ],
  "entities": [
    "User",
    "Loan",
    "Application",
    "Disbursement",
    "Repayment"
  ],
  "apis": [
    "User API",
    "Loan API",
    "Application API",
    "Disbursement API",
    "Repayment API"
  ],
  "integrations": [
    "Third-party credit scoring",
    "Payment gateway"
  ],
  "security": {
    "authentication": "OAuth2",
    "data_encryption": "Encryption for sensitive data",
    "audits": "Regular security audits"
  },
  "developer_handoff": [
    "Detailed API documentation",
    "Code reviews"
  ],
  "qa_handoff": [
    "Test cases",
    "Staging environment"
  ],
  "deployment_handoff": [
    "CI/CD pipeline",
    "Docker containers"
  ]
}
